metadata.ogDescription: Describe the problem/error/question I’m using an AI Agent with HTTP tools. The agent generates the params.  I’m trying to pass an Array of strings. [“Id”] however on testing I noticed the request would only be accepted if structured {{ [“ID”] }} and would only then recognize it as an array.  I updated the description of my HTTP AI Tool, but after 6 tests it cannot find a way to format it as JSON so that the param will be accepted.  What is the error message (if any)?
